name: @grain/tests-perf
description: Performance (k6) benchmarks for the Grain Hono API. Scripts target the real running server; the /api/chat/stream script must run against the mock-Claude shim (tests/e2e/scripts/mock-claude.mjs) because real Claude calls cost tokens, are slow, and are non-deterministic.

scripts.test:perf:all: k6 run scripts/health.k6.js && k6 run scripts/claims.k6.js && k6 run scripts/reports.k6.js && k6 run scripts/sources.k6.js && k6 run scripts/chat-stream.k6.js
